attributes.content:
## Overview

The Gift Card card gives the workspace a structured home for stored value card with balance, activation status, and transaction history.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Gift Card acts as a canonical operational record. It keeps important facts, state changes, timestamps, and linked parties in one place so downstream workflows, approvals, and reporting can all rely on the same source of truth.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[Product]]** -- Product can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Gift Card.
- **[[Order]]** -- Order can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Gift Card.
- **[[Invoice]]** -- Invoice can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Gift Card.
- **[[Deal]]** -- Deal can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Gift Card.
- **[[Contact]]** -- Gift Card often needs a person-level reference for ownership, communication, or accountability.
- **[[Organization]]** -- Gift Card frequently sits inside an account, company, or team-level relationship context.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Gift Card as the structured home for stored value card with balance, activation status, and transaction history and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Gift Card when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Gift Card stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.

cardInfo.name: Gift Card
cardInfo.summary: Stored value card with balance, activation status, and transaction history.
